items.title: John McClain, Co-Executor of Michael Jackson Estate and Longtime Music Executive, Dies at 71
items.summary: John McClain, the veteran music executive who was co-executor of the Michael Jackson estate and helped engineer the financial recovery of the singer’s legacy and properties, has died, a rep for the estate confirms. items.title: ‘Emily in Paris’ Actor Pierre Deny Dies at 69

items.title: Mnogi na autocestama voze lijevom trakom. "Desna je užasna, čuvam auto i sebe"
items.summary: VOZAČI na autocesti A3 sve češće voze lijevom trakom zbog uništene desne, riskirajući kaznu. HAC je svjestan problema i najavljuje opsežnu sanaciju kolnika na više dionica u iduće tri godine.
